notes: Current main is v1.9.2. Do NOT re-propose: cosmetic Object.assign/{} (PR #2 declined). Issues #10 and #12/#13: CI caching and Dependabot config PRs blocked by GitHub Actions .github/ permission — do not attempt to modify .github/workflows/ files. PR #14 (BEGINS_WITH/CONTAINS) open. PR #19: docs README rewrite. PR #20: test hyphenated attr. PR #21: getItemsPage cursor pagination. PR #22: fix deleteItem ReturnValues. PR #25: fix all-undefined updates no-op. Two new PRs this run: eslint-jest plugin and test coverage for batchGetItems projection + ASC sort. Issue #24 is a GH issue (not PR) with patch instructions for CI caching. 37 existing jest/no-conditional-expect warnings surfaced by new eslint config — future run can address these incrementally.
